<!--
Thanks for contributing to Compendium!

Before submitting, please confirm:
- [ ] You've read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Your changes are scoped to a single concern
- [ ] You've added or updated tests to cover the change
- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` passes locally
- [ ] `dotnet test -c Release --filter "FullyQualifiedName!~IntegrationTests"` passes locally
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link issues with "Fixes #123" / "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the one that applies. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Documentation / test / tooling (no production code change)

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify the change? Unit tests, integration tests, manual repro, benchmarks. -->

## Packages touched

<!-- Which Compendium.* packages are affected? Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Compendium.Core
- [ ] Compendium.Abstractions (.Identity / .Email / .Billing / .AI)
- [ ] Compendium.Application
- [ ] Compendium.Infrastructure
- [ ] Compendium.Multitenancy
- [ ] Compendium.Adapters.* (specify: ______)
- [ ] Compendium.Testing
- [ ] Compendium.Extensions.ExternalAdapters
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling only

## Backwards compatibility

<!-- If this is a breaking change, describe the migration path. Otherwise write "No breaking changes." -->

## Release notes

<!-- One sentence describing the change for CHANGELOG.md. If not release-worthy, write "Not release-worthy." -->
